title: GitHub Review by gndrmnn

code_comments.body: Remove the specific line reference `611-614` as this will likely be stale in the future
code_comments.author: gndrmnn
code_comments.resolution: Removed the `611-614` line reference from the DECISION block at the top of `tests/e2e/keystone/rolling-update-zero-downtime/01-patch-image.yaml`; the comment now points to the `"Load images into kind"` step within the `e2e-operator` job in `.github/workflows/ci.yaml` by name instead of line number, keeping the pointer stable as `ci.yaml` changes.

resolution_summary: Addressed the external review comment by removing the brittle line-number reference `ci.yaml:611-614` from the DECISION block at the top of `tests/e2e/keystone/rolling-update-zero-downtime/01-patch-image.yaml`. Replaced it with a reference to the stable step name ("Load images into kind" step within the `e2e-operator` job in `.github/workflows/ci.yaml`), which survives future file edits and remains meaningful as the workflow evolves. No additional files were modified.
